title: Roll out pre-commit secret scanning
description: A procedure to introduce scanning to a repo, baseline existing findings, and make the gate enforce on new secrets.
body: Use when adding secret scanning to a repo that has none. Do not block all work on a backlog of historical findings at once. Steps: run an initial scan to inventory findings; rotate any live secrets discovered; baseline known non-secret matches deliberately; enable the pre-commit hook and CI gate for new commits; review the baseline periodically. Validation signals include new secrets being blocked while the baseline does not mask fresh leaks. Risk boundary: baselining a real secret to silence the scanner hides a live leak, so only baseline verified non-secrets and escalate anything uncertain.
